# Builtric

> Builtric is a construction management software platform that unifies procurement, finance, project delivery, dashboards, and reporting into one source of truth. Built by LMKR, it helps construction teams protect margins, schedules, and mission-critical risks from planning to handover.

Builtric serves contractors, project managers, developers, and consultants with role-specific tools for real-time project visibility, financial control, and coordinated decision-making.

- Website: https://builtric.com
- Product app: https://app.builtric.com
- Contact: https://builtric.com/builtric-contact

## Core pages

- [Home](https://builtric.com/): Construction management software overview — unified project intelligence, real-time visibility, and platform capabilities
- [Features](https://builtric.com/builtric-features): Procurement, finance, project management, HSE, data management, dashboards, and secure construction data
- [Packages](https://builtric.com/builtric-packages): Standard, Professional, and Enterprise plans with feature comparison
- [Who We Serve](https://builtric.com/builtric-who-we-serve): Solutions for contractors, project managers, developers, and consultants
- [About](https://builtric.com/builtric-about): Company story, mission, and track record (971 contracts managed, $1B+ project value handled digitally)

## Get started

- [Book a Demo](https://builtric.com/builtric-demo): Request a personalised Builtric product demonstration
- [Custom Quote](https://builtric.com/builtric-custom-quote): Request a tailored quote based on team size, workflows, and integrations
- [Contact](https://builtric.com/builtric-contact): Talk to the Builtric team about pricing, implementation, or partnerships

- [Privacy Policy & Terms](https://builtric.com/builtric-legal): Privacy policy and terms of service
